date_notes: Closures confirmed spring 2012; exact date of final closure varies by library location.
title_en: Federal government closes majority of fisheries research libraries
title_fr: Le gouvernement fédéral ferme la majorité des bibliothèques de recherche halieutique
description_en: The Department of Fisheries and Oceans closes 7 of 9 regional research libraries. Scientists and librarians reported loss of irreplaceable materials. Documented as a science-information event of the Harper period.
inference_note: INFERENCE (project framing — labelled as such in UI): the federal-era pattern of constraining public science and information is presented as upstream context for later health-skepticism in Alberta. This is a reasoned connection, not an established causal fact.
